cards.edge_thesis: Diversified composite of current active paper strategies rather than a standalone alpha signal.
cards.economic_mechanism: Causal Thesis: portfolio-level diversification may reduce idiosyncratic strategy noise; it is not independent evidence of a new alpha source, and returns depend on constituents.
limitations: Rule-based V1 explanation; Causal Thesis is a hypothesis, not proof.
Return Attribution remains missing unless factor/sector/long-short decomposition artifacts exist.
Paper/shadow monitoring only; no execution authority is created by this card.
